title: Income Approach: Which of the following is a common approach to valuing...
summary: Analyze a real estate finance concept related to Income Approach.
prompt: Which of the following is a common approach to valuing commercial properties?

options.text: Valuing commercial properties can be achieved through multiple approaches,

solution: Valuing commercial properties can be achieved through multiple approaches, including the income approach, which estimates a property's value based on its income-generating potential; the cost approach, which considers the replacement costs of the property; and the comparable sales approach, which evaluates similar properties in the market. Each method serves to provide a comprehensive understanding of a property's value in different contexts.
